productName: Honey Tree Flavored Prana Pulse AIO Disposable - Huckleberry OG
description: This hybrid disposable carries Huckleberry OG in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Simple, smooth, portable, with notes of berry, sweet, and flowery, leading into a versatile, anytime balance.
